generatedAtPolicy: Live artifact. Regenerate with npm run postman:docs:write after official Postman/Newman docs sweeps.

target.postmanDocs: Official learning.postman.com scripting/Newman docs plus official postmanlabs.com/postman-collection SDK references discovered from the live sitemap.
